name: opencode-mcp

scripts.verify: node -e "const cfg=require('./opencode.json'); const server=cfg.mcp?.atlassian; if(!server?.url){throw new Error('Missing Atlassian MCP server config')} console.log('OpenCode MCP config ok:', server.url);"

description: OpenCode example wired to the Atlassian MCP server for Jira and Confluence
